caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt and dark trousers stands on a stage during an "openstack summit" presentation. He is positioned to the left of a tall, black lectern. Behind him, a large screen displays presentation slides. The top slides feature a blue bird logo and the title "SurCloud All-In-One Appliance For OpenStack," listing features such as "Includes everything needed for an OpenStack system," "Low entry barrier," and "High performance at low cost." A picture of a black server rack is also visible. As the presentation progresses, the screen changes to "Product Specs," detailing "Up to 20 dual CPU physical servers," "Up to 1.44PB useable storage," and "SUSE OpenStack Cloud," accompanied by images of server components and the "SUSE" logo. The background of the stage features a blue cityscape silhouette with the "openstack summit" logo at the bottom right.
